focus: Independent re-verification of packet verification claims

findingsNew.title: Full-suite verification count no longer matches the packet's claimed baseline
findingsNew.claim: The packet's verification docs claim the existing code-graph suite with the new flag off preserves the pre-existing baseline, but the current flag-off full-suite run produced a different and larger failure count.
evidenceRefs: command: env -u SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_EDGE_CONFIDENCE_DIFFERENTIATION npx vitest run -> exit 1, Test Files 9 failed | 80 passed (89), Tests 23 failed | 733 passed | 1 skipped (757)
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Read package.json to use the real test entrypoint, unset SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_EDGE_CONFIDENCE_DIFFERENTIATION for the flag-off path, and separately confirmed typecheck plus focused seeded-PPR tests pass as claimed.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The broader suite may be sensitive to runtime state, cwd resolution, concurrent daemon state, or unrelated drift; that may explain the failures, but it still contradicts the packet's unqualified reproducible baseline-count claim in the current tree.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if a rerun in the documented expected environment produces the claimed baseline counts, or if the docs are amended to state the current reproducible baseline and environmental preconditions.

findingDetails.title: Full-suite verification count no longer matches the packet's claimed baseline
findingDetails.scopeProof: Ran the full code-graph vitest suite from .opencode/skills/system-code-graph with SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_EDGE_CONFIDENCE_DIFFERENTIATION unset; output was Test Files 9 failed | 80 passed (89), Tests 23 failed | 733 passed | 1 skipped (757), not the documented 6/9 or 5/8 baseline counts.

summary: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json completed with no reported errors
Test Files 9 failed | 80 passed (89); Tests 23 failed | 733 passed | 1 skipped (757)
